module.name: HiddenSearch
module.group: EPS delta from latest 3.x to latest 4.x (delta shown as percent of 3.x EPS)
module.param: metric=EPS AND branch=current AND NOT suite=apache_error AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP suite, platform | RENAME value AS valueCur | JOIN platform, suite [search EPS AND branch=3.x AND NOT suite=apache_error AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP suite, platform | RENAME value AS value3x] | EVAL valueDeltaPct = (valueCur - value3x) / (value3x / 100) | CHART avg(valueDeltaPct) BY suite, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.group: EPS delta from latest 3.x to latest 4.x (delta shown as percent of 3.x EPS)
module.param: metric=EPS AND branch=current AND NOT suite=apache_error AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP suite, platform | RENAME value AS valueCur | JOIN platform, suite [search EPS AND branch=3.x AND NOT suite=apache_error AND NOT platform=windows2003_32b | DEDUP suite, platform | RENAME value AS value3x] | EVAL valueDeltaPct = (valueCur - value3x) / (value3x / 100) | CHART avg(valueDeltaPct) BY suite, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=j2ee_8gb | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=dogfood2007 | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=interop06_104mb | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=interop06_104mb_TCP | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=interop06_Cooked | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.name: HiddenSearch
module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=motorola_318mb | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform

module.param: NOT (pname OR period) metric=EPS branch=current suite=qperf | CHART avg(value) BY change, platform
